text: Caddxpert AI Innovations is a professional training institute dedicated to providing industry-oriented technical and professional education. Powered by CAD Point, one of India's recognized technical training organizations, Caddxpert AI Innovations bridges the gap between academic learning and industry requirements. We offer practical, software-based training designed to prepare students for successful careers in engineering, architecture, manufacturing, construction, project management, business management, finance, and digital technologies. Our Vision is to become a leading professional skill development institute by delivering high-quality technical education that transforms students into industry-ready professionals. Our Mission is to deliver practical, industry-oriented training, equip students with modern software skills, improve employability through hands-on learning, support students with career guidance and placement assistance, and continuously update training according to industry trends. Why choose us? We offer a project-based curriculum, experienced trainers, latest software versions, individual attention, and dedicated placement assistance.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers comprehensive courses in Mechanical, Automobile & Aerospace Engineering. The programs are designed to provide essential skills as well as advanced proficiency in industry-leading CAD/CAM/CAE software. Available courses include: GD&T Essential, Creo Essential, NX CAD Essential, SolidWorks Essential, CATIA Essential, Ansys Workbench Essential, Mastercam Essential, Ansys Fluent Essential, Autodesk Inventor Essential, CATIA Kinematics Essential, Creo Simulate Essential, HyperMesh Essential, NX Nastran Essential, NX CAM Essential, Reverse Engineering using CATIA Essential, SolidWorks Motion Essential, Non-Destructive Testing Essential. We also offer professional-level programs such as Proficient in AutoCAD for Mechanical Engineers, Proficient in Creo, Proficient in SolidWorks, Proficient in NX, Proficient in CATIA, Proficient in CAE, and Proficient in Ansys. These courses are tailored for diploma holders, engineering graduates, and working professionals looking to advance their design and engineering careers.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers a wide range of courses in Civil, Structural & Architectural Engineering. These programs focus on design visualization, building information modeling (BIM), structure analysis, and construction project management. Available courses include: Design Visualization Essential, V-Ray Essential, SketchUp Essential, Revit Architecture Essential, STAAD.Pro Essential, Construction Management using MSP, 3ds Max for Engineers/Architects Essential, ETABS Essential, MSP with PPM Concepts Essential, Building Estimation and Costing with Simulation, ProSteel Essential, Ansys Civil Essential, AECOsim Essential, AutoCAD Civil 3D Essential, MicroStation Essential, MX Road Essential, RCC Detailing Essential. Additionally, we provide advanced programs: Proficient in AutoCAD for Civil Engineers and Architects, Proficient in Revit, Proficient in STAAD.Pro, Proficient in Primavera for Construction Management, Proficient in Interior & Architectural Design, Proficient in Construction Management using Primavera & MSP, Proficient in 3D BIM, Proficient in BIM for Transportation Design, Proficient in BIM for Structural Design, and Proficient in 5D BIM.

Caddxpert AI Innovations provides diverse skill training programs across multiple engineering and business domains. In Electrical & Electronics Engineering, we offer Proficient in AutoCAD for Electrical & Electronics Engineers and Proficient in Electrical CAD. For MEP, Piping & Plant Engineering, courses include PDMS Essential, HVAC Design Essential, REVIT MEP Essential, Proficient in MEP Design, Proficient in HVAC and MEP Design, Proficient in Piping Design, SP3D, and E3D. In General CAD, we offer AutoCAD Essential, Proficient in CAD, and Proficient in QA/QC. For Project Management, we train in Primavera Project Planning and Management, Primavera Scheduling Professional, Primavera Tracking Professional, and Primavera Application Administration. We also offer SAP ERP (SAP FICO, SAP MM, SAP PP, SAP SD), Data Analytics (MS Excel Basics, Advanced Excel, Microsoft Power BI), Finance & Accounting (Business Accounting and Taxation, Tally Prime Foundation, Tally Prime Advanced, Tally Prime Complete), and a Certified Digital Marketing Program (Foundation).

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers a Software Development category with 9 courses in programming languages and web/mobile frameworks. All courses include 100% placement assistance and are available Offline and Online. Courses: (1) Java - Core Java Programming (2 months): Java syntax, OOP concepts, control flow, arrays, strings, exception handling, basic I/O. (2) Advanced Java - Enterprise Application Development (3 months): JDBC, Servlets, JSP, Spring/Hibernate frameworks, REST/SOAP web services, multithreading and concurrency. (3) C Programming - Foundational System Programming (1.5 months): C basics, functions, pointers, memory management, arrays, structures, file I/O. (4) C++ Programming - Object-Oriented C++ (2 months): C++ OOP, classes, inheritance, polymorphism, templates, exceptions, Standard Template Library (STL). (5) Python - Versatile Programming (2 months): Python syntax, data structures (lists, dictionaries, sets, tuples), OOP in Python, file handling, intro to NumPy and Pandas. (6) Full Stack Development - MEAN/MERN Stack (4-6 months): HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), React or Angular, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, RESTful APIs, deployment. (7) Django - Python Web Framework (2 months): MVT architecture, models, database migrations, views, URL routing, templates, authentication, Django REST Framework. (8) Android App Development using Kotlin - Modern Android Development (3 months): Kotlin basics, Android Studio, UI/UX with XML/Jetpack Compose, Activities, Room Database, Retrofit for networking. (9) ASP.NET with C# - Microsoft Web Application Development (3 months): C# basics, ASP.NET Core, MVC pattern, Entity Framework Core, Web APIs, authentication and security.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers a Special Programs category with 14 courses in data science, AI, machine learning, and emerging technologies. All courses include 100% placement assistance and are available Offline and Online. Courses: (1) Data Science - Comprehensive Data Analysis & Modeling (3 months): data exploration, preprocessing, statistical analysis, data visualization, predictive modeling, model evaluation, data storytelling. (2) Data Science & Data Engineering using Python - Building Robust Data Pipelines (4 months): Pandas, NumPy, ETL processes, SQL/NoSQL, Big Data concepts (Hadoop/Spark), pipeline orchestration, model deployment. (3) Data Science using R - Statistical Computing & Graphics (2.5 months): R programming, data manipulation with dplyr, visualization with ggplot2, statistical modeling, time series analysis, R Markdown reports. (4) Data Analytics using Power BI - Business Intelligence & Dashboards (1.5 months): connecting data sources, Power Query transformation, data modeling, DAX expressions, interactive dashboards, Power BI Service. (5) Machine Learning - Algorithms and Predictive Analytics (3 months): supervised learning (regression, classification), unsupervised learning (clustering, dimensionality reduction), ensemble methods (random forest, gradient boosting), hyperparameter tuning, feature engineering. (6) Machine Learning using Python - Applied ML with Scikit-Learn (2.5 months): Scikit-Learn, regression, classification, clustering, ML pipelines, model evaluation. (7) Machine Learning using R - Statistical ML Implementation (2.5 months): caret/mlr packages, linear and logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, SVM, cross-validation. (8) Blockchain - Decentralized Ledger Technology (3 months): cryptography, blockchain architecture, consensus mechanisms, Ethereum, Solidity, smart contracts, DApps. (9) Artificial Intelligence - Foundations of AI & Deep Learning (4 months): neural networks, TensorFlow/PyTorch, CNNs, RNNs, computer vision, NLP introduction. (10) Robotic Process Automation RPA - Automating Business Workflows (2 months): RPA concepts, UiPath/Automation Anywhere, workflow design, data scraping, exception handling, bot deployment. (11) Robotics - Hardware and Control Systems (3.5 months): kinematics, dynamics, sensors, actuators, motor control, Arduino/Raspberry Pi, Robot Operating System (ROS), autonomous navigation. (12) Internet of Things IoT - Connecting Devices and Systems (3 months): IoT architecture, MQTT/CoAP protocols, microcontrollers, edge computing, AWS/Azure IoT integration, IoT security. (13) Complete Guide to NLP ChatGPT - Generative AI and Prompt Engineering (2 months): NLP fundamentals, tokenization, embeddings, transformer models, OpenAI API, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, building AI chatbots and agents. (14) Fundamentals of Additive Manufacturing using 3D Printing - From CAD to Physical Object (1.5 months): FDM/SLA technologies, 3D printing materials, CAD design for additive manufacturing, slicing software, printer operation, post-processing.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers an Industrial Automation category for engineering students and professionals in electrical and control engineering. All courses include 100% placement assistance and are available Offline and Online. Courses: (1) PLC & SCADA - Programmable Logic Controllers and Supervisory Control (2.5 months): introduction to industrial automation, PLC hardware and architecture, ladder logic programming basics, advanced PLC instructions and timers, SCADA system design and configuration, HMI (Human-Machine Interface) integration. (2) Electrical Power System Analysis - Modeling and Simulation of Power Grids (2 months): power system component modeling, load flow analysis (Newton-Raphson and Gauss-Seidel methods), symmetrical and unsymmetrical fault analysis, transient stability studies, power system simulation software (ETAP, MATLAB), protection coordination basics.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers an Electronic Design Automation (EDA) category for students and professionals in electronics and embedded systems engineering. All courses include 100% placement assistance and are available Offline and Online. Courses: (1) MATLAB - Technical Computing and Simulation (1.5 months): MATLAB workspace and syntax, matrix and array operations, data visualization (2D and 3D plotting), programming scripts and functions, introduction to Simulink for system modeling, solving ordinary differential equations. (2) Microcontroller - Embedded Systems Fundamentals (2 months): microcontroller architecture and pin diagram (8051 or PIC), embedded C programming basics, I/O port programming, timers and counters, interrupt handling, interfacing LEDs, LCDs, and keypads. (3) Advanced Microcontroller - ARM Cortex and Advanced Embedded Systems (2.5 months): ARM architecture and instruction set, advanced peripheral configuration (ADC, DAC, PWM), communication protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, CAN), introduction to Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOS), task scheduling and resource management, developing IoT applications with advanced MCUs.

Caddxpert AI Innovations offers training across the following major course categories: (1) Mechanical, Automobile & Aerospace Engineering — CAD/CAM/CAE software including SolidWorks, CATIA, NX, Creo, Ansys, Mastercam, HyperMesh. (2) Civil, Structural & Architectural Engineering — BIM, Revit, STAAD.Pro, ETABS, AutoCAD Civil 3D, Primavera, 3ds Max. (3) Electrical, MEP, Piping & Plant Engineering — Electrical CAD, REVIT MEP, HVAC, PDMS, SP3D, E3D. (4) General CAD, Project Management, SAP ERP, Finance & Accounting, Digital Marketing. (5) Software Development — Java, Advanced Java, C, C++, Python, Full Stack MEAN/MERN, Django, Android (Kotlin), ASP.NET with C#. (6) Special Programs — Data Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, RPA, Robotics, IoT, NLP/ChatGPT, 3D Printing, Power BI, R programming, Data Engineering. (7) Industrial Automation — PLC & SCADA, Electrical Power System Analysis. (8) Electronic Design Automation (EDA) — MATLAB, Microcontroller, Advanced Microcontroller (ARM Cortex). All programs offer 100% placement assistance and are available in both Offline and Online modes.

The training methodology at Caddxpert AI Innovations features classroom sessions, practical software training, real-world projects, industry-based exercises, assignments, trainer guidance, and dedicated doubt clarification. Students who complete their course requirements successfully are eligible to receive a course completion certificate. The institute provides career guidance, resume support, interview preparation, and placement assistance to connect students with industry opportunities. However, placement depends on student performance, eligibility, available opportunities, and employer selection processes; employment cannot be guaranteed. Depending on the selected course, students can pursue career opportunities such as Design Engineer, CAD Engineer, Mechanical Design Engineer, Product Design Engineer, Civil Design Engineer, Structural Engineer, BIM Engineer, HVAC Engineer, MEP Engineer, Piping Engineer, Project Planner, QA/QC Engineer, ERP/SAP Consultant, Data Analyst, Business Analyst, Accountant, Digital Marketing Executive, Software Developer, Java Developer, Python Developer, Full Stack Developer, Android Developer, Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, RPA Developer, IoT Engineer, PLC/SCADA Engineer, or Embedded Systems Engineer.

Caddxpert AI Innovations is located at 21/2, Durgalaya Road, Madappuram, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu - 610001. For inquiries, contact the admissions team via phone at +91 82484 90202 or email at cadpointthiruvarur@gmail.com. The admission process involves contacting the admissions team, selecting the appropriate course, receiving career counselling, completing the registration process, submitting required documents, confirming admission, and joining the allocated batch. Learning modes include Offline Classroom Training and Practical Lab Sessions. Course durations, fees, and batch timings are not disclosed through the chatbot. For the latest fee structure, payment installment options, discounts, scholarship opportunities, and batch schedules, please contact the admissions team directly. Course availability may change over time, and new courses are introduced periodically to align with industry trends.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) about Caddxpert AI Innovations:
- What is Caddxpert AI Innovations? It is a professional technical training institute powered by CAD Point that offers industry-oriented software and professional skill development courses.
- Is the institute powered by CAD Point? Yes, our training programs are powered by CAD Point.
- Who can join? Students, graduates, diploma holders, working professionals, and job seekers can join eligible courses.
- Are beginners allowed? Yes. Beginners can join suitable foundation-level courses based on counselling.
- Do you provide practical training? Yes. Practical learning and hands-on lab sessions are key parts of our training methodology.
- Will I work on projects? Yes, project-based learning is included depending on the course.
- Do you provide placement assistance? Yes, eligible students receive placement assistance and career guidance.
- Will I receive a certificate? Yes, eligible students who successfully complete the course receive a course completion certificate.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) about courses and policies at Caddxpert AI Innovations:
- What software will I learn? The software depends entirely on the selected course category.
- Which course is best for Mechanical Engineering? Mechanical students can choose from Creo, SolidWorks, CATIA, NX, Ansys, Mastercam, HyperMesh, AutoCAD Mechanical, and related programs.
- Which course is best for Civil Engineering? Civil students can choose Revit, STAAD.Pro, ETABS, AutoCAD Civil 3D, BIM, Primavera, and related programs.
- Which course is best for Electrical Engineering? Electrical students can enroll in Electrical CAD and AutoCAD Electrical-related programs.
- Which course is suitable for MEP? REVIT MEP, HVAC Design, PDMS, SP3D, E3D, and MEP Design programs are available.
- Do you offer Software Development courses? Yes, we offer Java, Advanced Java, C, C++, Python, Full Stack MEAN/MERN, Django, Android App Development using Kotlin, and ASP.NET with C#.
- Do you offer Data Science or AI courses? Yes, under Special Programs we offer Data Science, Data Science using R, Data Engineering using Python, Machine Learning, Machine Learning using Python, Machine Learning using R, and Artificial Intelligence courses.
- Do you offer Power BI or analytics training? Yes, Data Analytics using Power BI is available under Special Programs (1.5 months).
- Do you offer Blockchain or ChatGPT training? Yes, Blockchain (3 months) and a Complete Guide to NLP & ChatGPT (2 months) are available under Special Programs.
- Do you offer Robotics or IoT courses? Yes, Robotics (3.5 months), Internet of Things/IoT (3 months), and Robotic Process Automation/RPA (2 months) are available under Special Programs.
- Do you offer 3D Printing courses? Yes, Fundamentals of Additive Manufacturing using 3D Printing (1.5 months) is available under Special Programs.
- Do you offer Industrial Automation? Yes, we offer PLC & SCADA (2.5 months) and Electrical Power System Analysis (2 months) under the Industrial Automation category.
- Do you offer MATLAB or Microcontroller courses? Yes, MATLAB (1.5 months), Microcontroller (2 months), and Advanced Microcontroller using ARM Cortex (2.5 months) are available under Electronic Design Automation (EDA).
- Do you teach SAP? Yes, SAP FICO, MM, PP, and SD courses are available.
- Do you offer Digital Marketing? Yes, a Certified Digital Marketing Program is available.
- What are the course fees? Course fees are not provided via the chatbot. Please contact the admissions team for the latest fees and installment options.
- Can working professionals or final-year students join? Yes, both are welcome.
